title: Threat Hunting Outcomes Logged for Repeatable Hunts

compliance.assurance_rationale: Auto-migrated from cat-22 markdown on Phase 1.3 run. Requires SME review to confirm clause accuracy, mode (satisfies vs detects-violation-of), and assurance level (contributing/partial/full).

app: Splunk Enterprise Security (Splunkbase 263) — Enterprise Security Content Update or custom KVStore
spl:
index=thunt sourcetype=hunt:record earliest=-90d
| stats values(hypothesis) as hyps, latest(outcome) as outcome, max(duration_min) as duration by hunt_id, hunter
| where outcome="inconclusive" OR duration>480
value: Structures hunt hypothesis, queries, and findings for RA-10 threat hunting (as organizational capability evidence).
implementation: (1) Require hunt closure fields; (2) link to IR tickets when escalated; (3) quarterly metrics for leadership; (4) library of proven SPL in repo outside Splunk.
visualization: Table (hunt backlog), Bar chart (outcomes), Single value (inconclusive %)
knownFalsePositives: Administrative tasks, scheduled jobs or platform updates can match this pattern — correlate with change management, maintenance windows and user role before raising severity.
